name: North American Palladium Ltd.
description: North American Palladium Ltd. was a Canadian mining company that operated between 1968 and 2019. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, the company was primarily known as the world's only pure-play palladium producer. Its core asset was the Lac des Iles mine, located northwest of Thunder Bay, Ontario, which produced palladium along with platinum, gold, copper, and nickel as by-products. The company was acquired by Impala Platinum Holdings Limited (Implats) in 2019, marking the end of its existence as an independent publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange.
